mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM psi_independent_demand WHERE del_flag = '0'
AND demand_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.demandNo}, '%')
AND company LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.company}, '%')
AND supplier_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.supplierName}, '%')
ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM psi_independent_demand WHERE id = #{id} AND del_flag = '0'

SELECT id AS item_id, demand_id, demand_no, line_no, material_id, material_code, material_name, factory AS item_factory, required_qty, unit, required_date, demand_status AS item_status, create_by AS item_create_by, create_time AS item_create_time, update_by AS item_update_by, update_time AS item_update_time, del_flag AS item_del_flag FROM psi_independent_demand_item WHERE demand_id = #{demandId} AND del_flag = '0' ORDER BY line_no ASC
mapper.delete: UPDATE psi_independent_demand_item SET del_flag = '1' WHERE demand_id = #{demandId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO psi_independent_demand_item ( id, demand_id, demand_no, line_no, material_id, material_code, material_name, factory, required_qty, unit, required_date, demand_status, create_by, create_time, del_flag ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{demandId}, #{demandNo}, #{lineNo}, #{materialId}, #{materialCode}, #{materialName}, #{factory}, #{requiredQty}, #{unit}, #{requiredDate}, #{demandStatus}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, '0' )
mapper.update: UPDATE psi_independent_demand_item SET line_no = #{lineNo}, material_id = #{materialId}, material_code = #{materialCode}, material_name = #{materialName}, factory = #{factory}, required_qty = #{requiredQty}, unit = #{unit}, required_date = #{requiredDate}, demand_status = #{demandStatus}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM psi_independent_demand WHERE demand_no = #{demandNo} AND del_flag = '0'
